function m(m)return n[m+(-45253-(-66737))]end for m,Y in ipairs({{395989-395988;716111-715840};{-584645+584646,-924694-(-924758)};{553137-553072,369973-369702}})do while n=-650042+650043,#Y,-412944+412945 do local x=Y[n]if E(x)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local E=y(x)local H={}local T=-315541+315542 local p=1022939-1022939 local K=-104+104 while T<=E do local
